_meta.title: NOVIQ Engine — Complete Medical Logic Knowledge Base v2

bmi_gate.rule: Sleeve Gastrectomy covered ONLY if BMI > 40 (Morbid Obesity)
bmi_gate.engine_action: AUTO_CALCULATE BMI from Weight(kg) / Height(m)^2 — do NOT accept manual entry
bmi_gate.rejection_condition: BMI ≤ 40 → REJECT as cosmetic weight-loss procedure

bypass_band_default.rule: Gastric Bypass and Lap Band are COSMETIC by default — not covered

revisional_complexity.rule: All revisional bariatric procedures require primary surgery documentation

leak_repair.rule: Bariatric Leak Repair = COMMON COMPLICATION — not malpractice
leak_repair.methylene_blue_gate: Engine MUST check operative findings for Methylene Blue Test documentation — key quality indicator
leak_repair.engine_action: FLAG if Methylene Blue Test absent from operative notes

adhesiolysis_coverage.rule: Adhesiolysis = standalone covered procedure ONLY when linked to Laparotomy or Repeated C-Sections (3+ times)
adhesiolysis_coverage.engine_action: APPROVE if linked to CS>3 or Laparotomy — REJECT as standalone cosmetic

laparoscopic_exploration.rule: Laparoscopic Exploration preferred and approved over open midline exploration
laparoscopic_exploration.engine_action: PRIORITIZE in approval workflow as modern standard of care

hernia_reflux_critical.rule: Ventral Hernia, Hiatal Hernia, Fundoplication = HIGH RISK — flag for senior medical review
hernia_reflux_critical.hiatus_hernia_trap: Hiatus hernia often misdiagnosed as GERD or Peptic Ulcer — flag for senior review
hernia_reflux_critical.engine_action: FLAG_SENIOR_REVIEW for all hiatal hernia and fundoplication cases

whipple_oncology.rule: Whipple / Gastrojejunostomy = highly complex oncology. Engine must distinguish curative vs palliative intent

reduction_mammoplasty.rule: Breast Reduction = COSMETIC by default — covered ONLY if linked to chronic back pain or degenerative OA of thoracic/lumbar spine
reduction_mammoplasty.required_icd: Must link ICD-10 code for Thoracic/Lumbar pain or OA to override cosmetic exclusion
reduction_mammoplasty.engine_action: FLAG_REJECTION_RISK if no spinal ICD code present with breast reduction

oncologic_protocol.rule: All malignant breast cases require wide local excision WITH guaranteed safety margin
oncologic_protocol.ln_mandatory: LN excision mandatory for histopathological staging in all oncologic breast cases
oncologic_protocol.engine_action: FLAG if Safety Margin and LN Excision not documented in operative findings

abscess_emergency.rule: Breast Abscess = EMERGENCY — auto-approve, bypass standard pre-auth
abscess_emergency.mastitis_lactational: Lactational Mastitis = purely medical condition, fully covered, NOT subject to maternity sub-limits
abscess_emergency.urgent_6_rule: Priority emergency abscess types: Breast, Brain (2B), Lung, Liver (2L), Gluteal (G)
abscess_emergency.engine_action: AUTO_APPROVE — set urgency flag, bypass pre-authorization

cosmetic_exclusions.rule: Strict cosmetic exclusions: Breast Augmentation, Mastopexy — auto-flag if submitted as medical
cosmetic_exclusions.engine_action: AUTO_REJECT or FLAG_COSMETIC if submitted without medical necessity documentation

biopsy_diagnostic.rule: Core Needle Biopsy and Excisional Biopsy = diagnostic path for histopathology — covered
biopsy_diagnostic.engine_action: APPROVE as diagnostic procedure — foundational for staging

free_flap_anastomosis.rule: Breast Reconstruction Free Flap = highest complexity (9). Requires microvascular anastomosis documentation
free_flap_anastomosis.engine_action: FLAG if anastomosis technique not documented in operative notes

skin_graft_coverage.rule: STSG/FTSG generally covered — UNLESS injury caused by exclusion: extreme sports, war, self-inflicted
skin_graft_coverage.los_benchmark: Standard LOS = 1 day. First dressing change Day 5 — outpatient follow-up if stable, no comorbidities
skin_graft_coverage.engine_action: EXCLUSION_HUNTER: check mode of injury in ER notes for policy exclusions

free_flap_complexity.rule: Microvascular Free Flap = complexity 9, highest level — requires anastomosis documentation
free_flap_complexity.engine_action: FLAG if microvascular anastomosis not documented in operative notes

abdominoplasty.rule: Abdominoplasty = COSMETIC by default — covered ONLY when linked to hernia repair (umbilical, para-umbilical, incisional)
abdominoplasty.umbilical_coding: Umbilical Reconstruction should be coded as ADDITIONAL procedure — reflects true surgical skill
abdominoplasty.engine_action: REJECT as cosmetic unless hernia ICD code present. FLAG umbilical reconstruction as add-on code

cosmetic_exclusions.rule: Liposuction, Tissue Expanders, Scar Revision = cosmetic exclusions
cosmetic_exclusions.scar_revision_exception: Scar Revision accepted ONLY as part of repeated C-section billing — NOT as standalone
cosmetic_exclusions.keloid_exception: Keloid Excision rejected as cosmetic UNLESS keloid impairs vital function
cosmetic_exclusions.gynecomastia: Gynecomastia = cosmetic/hormonal condition — check for lipoma tissue under nipple for any coverage
cosmetic_exclusions.engine_action: AUTO_REJECT standalone scar revision. FLAG keloid without functional impairment documentation

fixation_selection.plate_rule: Plates & Screws (ORIF) = for articular/peri-articular fractures near joints
fixation_selection.im_nail_rule: IM Nailing = for long bone SHAFT fractures (Femur, Humerus, Tibia)
fixation_selection.hardware_removal: Hardware removal decision based on healing status on X-ray films
fixation_selection.fat_embolism_alert: CRITICAL: Fat Embolism is high-risk specific complication in Femur nailing — flag
fixation_selection.engine_action: HARDWARE_AUDITOR: verify fixation method matches fracture type in operative notes

mode_of_trauma.rule: Engine MUST verify Mode of Trauma and Incident Cause for all fracture/trauma cases
mode_of_trauma.exclusion_check: Non-covered if: professional sports, criminal acts, hazardous activities
mode_of_trauma.engine_action: EXCLUSION_HUNTER — active for all trauma/fracture cases

hip_age_gate.rule: DHS = first choice for YOUNGER patients without AVN. Hip Replacement = preferred for ELDERLY patients
hip_age_gate.avn_check: Engine must check for Avascular Necrosis (AVN) in diagnosis — changes DHS to replacement
hip_age_gate.engine_action: AGE_GATE: if elderly + hip fracture → recommend Hemiarthroplasty/THR over DHS

knee_mri_gate.rule: Knee Arthroscopy requires MRI confirmation of Grade 3 or 4 OA, degenerative tears, or patellar instability

age_protocol.young: Surgery is first-line — facilitate perfect recovery
age_protocol.elderly: Conservative first (Medical, Physio, Steroid/Hyaluronic injections) — surgery as LAST RESORT

knee_mri_gate.prp_rejection: PRP/Plasma injections = AUTO_REJECT — not FDA approved, classified as trial
knee_mri_gate.tkr_preexisting: TKR frequently flagged as Pre-existing condition — watch for this flag
knee_mri_gate.engine_action: FLAG if MRI report absent for knee arthroscopy. AUTO_REJECT PRP. FLAG TKR for pre-existing check

shoulder_decompression.rule: Shoulder decompression often flagged as Upcoding by insurers — engine should defend based on surgical standards
shoulder_decompression.engine_action: FLAG_UPCODING_DEFENSE: document medical necessity for decompression procedures

spine_requirements.rule: Spinal Fusion requires MRI confirmation AND proof of failed conservative management
spine_requirements.levels_complexity: Complexity calculated by number of levels (1-level vs 3-level). More levels = higher complexity
spine_requirements.engine_action: FLAG if MRI absent or conservative management history not documented for spine cases

congenital_exclusions.rule: Scoliosis and Flatfoot = CONGENITAL conditions — strictly non-covered

arthroplasty_requirements.rule: TKR and THR require severe OA documentation. Hemiarthroplasty = elderly femoral neck fracture (emergency)
arthroplasty_requirements.tkr_imaging: TKR requires AP X-ray showing aggressive OA
arthroplasty_requirements.engine_action: FLAG if severe OA documentation absent for joint replacement cases

exclusion_hunter.description: Auto-reject if policy exclusion keywords found in ER/admission notes

bmi_calculator.description: Auto-calculate BMI from Weight/Height for bariatric coverage gate
bmi_calculator.action: REJECT if BMI ≤ 40 for weight-loss procedures

cosmetic_filter.description: Flag procedures submitted as medical when they are cosmetic by default
cosmetic_filter.action: AUTO_REJECT or FLAG_COSMETIC — unless medical exception documented

mri_gate.description: Knee arthroscopy and spinal surgery require MRI confirmation

age_gate.description: Hip fracture management differs by age — DHS for young, replacement for elderly

prp_rejector.description: PRP/Plasma injections are not FDA approved — auto-reject

methylene_blue_checker.description: Bariatric leak repair must document Methylene Blue Test
methylene_blue_checker.action: FLAG if Methylene Blue Test absent from operative notes

ncv_matcher.description: Carpal Tunnel surgery requires positive NCV/EMG report

oncologic_margin_checker.description: Breast oncology requires safety margin and LN excision documentation
oncologic_margin_checker.action: FLAG if Safety Margin or LN excision not in operative findings

hardware_auditor.description: Fixation method must match fracture type

rules.im_nail: Only for long bone shaft fractures

senior_review_flag.description: Complex or misdiagnosis-prone cases require senior medical review

note: Phase 5 Intelligence Layer input — keyword expansion and medical logic rules for Intent Agent and Medical Logic Agent

general_surgery.medical_coding_logic: LN Integrity: يجب مطابقة عدد العقد في تقرير العمليات مع تقرير الباثولوجي.
general_surgery.ai_triggers: Safety Gate: إصدار تنبيه فوراً إذا لم تذكر كلمة "RLN" أو "Parathyroid".

general_surgery.medical_coding_logic: The 12-Hr Rule: للأطفال (10-14 سنة) الجراحة ضرورية في < 12 ساعة لمنع الانفجار.
general_surgery.ai_triggers: Age-Risk Clock: تنبيه تأخير الجراحة للأطفال. كشف الـ Upcoding في المنظار (Cross-check Staplers).

general_surgery.medical_coding_logic: تستخدم عند التواء الزائدة (Kinked) وامتداد العدوى للقولون الصاعد والـ Jejunum.
general_surgery.ai_triggers: Extension Logic: السماح بالتكويد المعقد فقط عند ثبوت الـ Perforation الممتد في الباثولوجي.

general_surgery.medical_coding_logic: Small Stone Paradox: الحصوات الصغيرة (Microlithiasis) أخطر من الكبيرة لتسببها في انسداد الـ CBD.
general_surgery.ai_triggers: Adhesiolysis Guard: رفض كود الالتصاقات إلا في حالة وجود جراحات سابقة (Past history like CS).

general_surgery.medical_coding_logic: Congenital Shield: يرفض التأمين الفتق الإربي للشباب إلا إذا وثقت كحالة طارئة (Strangulated).
general_surgery.ai_triggers: Emergency Loophole: المحرك يبحث عن "Cord Obstruction" أو "Tear" لتمرير المطالبة تأمينياً.

general_surgery.medical_coding_logic: Defect Logic: الشبكة (Mesh 15x15) ضرورية وظيفياً للـ Defect الكبير ولا تعتبر تجميلاً.
general_surgery.ai_triggers: Cosmetic Filter: عزل الـ Abdominoplasty كإجراء تجميلي غير مغطى (90% Rejection).

general_surgery.medical_coding_logic: Grade Gate: تغطية الدرجة 3 و4 فقط. الـ Harmonic غير مبرر طبياً للبواسير.
general_surgery.ai_triggers: Technology Guard: رفض كود الـ Laser في 70% من البوالص وتنبيه الـ Upcoding للـ Harmonic.

general_surgery.medical_coding_logic: Sphincter Gate: الحالات الـ High تخترق الـ Internal sphincter وتتطلب 2-3 جلسات.
general_surgery.ai_triggers: Complexity Trigger: وجود خيط الـ "Seton" يرفع تصنيف الحالة تلقائياً ويبرر تعدد العمليات.

general_surgery.medical_coding_logic: Stoma Protocol: في الحالات الصعبة يتم عمل "فتحة جانبية" (Stoma) ثم غلقها لاحقاً (كودين منفصلين).
general_surgery.ai_triggers: Integrity Gate: منع المطالبة المالية بدون تقرير باثولوجي يثبت الـ Tumor والـ Safety margins.

general_surgery.medical_coding_logic: أعلى فئة تكويد (Special Char). مخصصة لحالات سرطان رأس البنكرياس.
general_surgery.ai_triggers: Max Tier Trigger: كلمات مثل "Duodenojejunostomy" تفعل أعلى تعويض مالي للمطالبة.

clinical_logic.clinical_gate: Ganglion Cyst: Must document Pain, Inflammation, or Tendon Friction especially near joints. Not cosmetic removal.
clinical_logic.documentation_rule: 6S Rule mandatory: Size, Site, Shape, Surface, Surroundings, Symptoms.
clinical_logic.imaging_note: Most cases clinically diagnosed; radiology not mandatory.
clinical_logic.insurance_risk: Rejection if documented as cosmetic or asymptomatic.

clinical_logic.clinical_gate: Ganglion Cyst: Must document Pain, Inflammation, or Tendon Friction especially near joints. Not cosmetic removal.
clinical_logic.documentation_rule: 6S Rule mandatory: Size, Site, Shape, Surface, Surroundings, Symptoms.
clinical_logic.imaging_note: Most cases clinically diagnosed; radiology not mandatory.
clinical_logic.insurance_risk: Rejection if documented as cosmetic or asymptomatic.

clinical_logic.clinical_gate: Surgery NOT approved without positive NCV/EMG Test showing Median/Ulnar nerve compression.
clinical_logic.documentation_rule: NCV Test is the gold standard — must be attached to claim. Can be 1st line if NCV confirms severe compression.
clinical_logic.insurance_risk: Flag for rejection risk if NCV report absent.
clinical_logic.ai_trigger: NCV Matcher: CTS Surgery without NCV Report → Flag for Rejection.

clinical_logic.clinical_gate: Surgery NOT approved without positive NCV/EMG Test showing Median/Ulnar nerve compression.
clinical_logic.documentation_rule: NCV Test is the gold standard — must be attached to claim. Can be 1st line if NCV confirms severe compression.
clinical_logic.insurance_risk: Flag for rejection risk if NCV report absent.
clinical_logic.ai_trigger: NCV Matcher: CTS Surgery without NCV Report → Flag for Rejection.

clinical_logic.clinical_gate: Must affect hand function — grip and object handling impaired.
clinical_logic.documentation_rule: Must verify patient occupation — potential Workman's Compensation if caused by repetitive motion at work.
clinical_logic.insurance_risk: Occupational Alert: Trigger Finger + Manual Labor job → Flag for Work-related Injury investigation.
clinical_logic.ai_trigger: Occupational Alert: cross-check occupation for insurance policy exclusions.

clinical_logic.clinical_gate: Must affect hand function — grip and object handling impaired.
clinical_logic.documentation_rule: Must verify patient occupation — potential Workman's Compensation if caused by repetitive motion at work.

clinical_logic.ai_trigger: Occupational Alert: cross-check occupation for insurance policy exclusions.

clinical_logic.clinical_gate: Mode of Injury must be confirmed from First Medical Report. Exclusion check: Fighting, Self-inflicted, Hazardous sports.
clinical_logic.documentation_rule: Primary repair for partial/complete tears. Tendon Grafting justified if tissue loss present.
clinical_logic.timing_rule: Repairs >24 hours post-injury risk infection — may require Delayed Repair coding tier.
clinical_logic.ai_trigger: Exclusion Hunter: Keywords "Fight", "Self-harm", "Adrenaline sports" → Auto-reject claim.

clinical_logic.documentation_rule: Post-op Rehabilitation Plan for sensory/motor recovery must be documented.
clinical_logic.ai_trigger: Exclusion Hunter active. Rehab plan absence → Flag for incomplete documentation.

clinical_logic.clinical_gate: Most common cause: Ischemia turned to Gangrene. Surgery at Line of Demarcation (Dead vs Viable tissue).
clinical_logic.documentation_rule: Must document line of demarcation in operative notes.
clinical_logic.insurance_risk: Trauma amputations: Mode of Injury exclusion check — hazardous sports, self-injury, fighting.

clinical_logic.clinical_gate: Primarily indicated for Scaphoid Fractures where ORIF is technically difficult.
clinical_logic.documentation_rule: Scaphoid fracture confirmation required. Complex small bones — standard ORIF may not be feasible.
clinical_logic.imaging_gate: X-ray in 3 views: AP, Lateral, Oblique mandatory.

clinical_logic.documentation_rule: Scaphoid fracture confirmation required. Complex small bones — standard ORIF may not be feasible.
clinical_logic.imaging_gate: X-ray in 3 views: AP, Lateral, Oblique mandatory.

clinical_logic.clinical_gate: Confirmed with X-ray in 3 views: AP, Lateral, Oblique.
clinical_logic.documentation_rule: K-Wire is standard. Plates & Screws only for Comminuted/Complex fractures.
clinical_logic.ai_trigger: Hardware Auditor: Plate & Screws for simple fracture → Flag as non-medically necessary.
clinical_logic.insurance_risk: Mode of Injury must be confirmed — avoid policy exclusions.

clinical_logic.clinical_gate: Emergency: Localized swelling + Vascular obstruction = Compartment Syndrome.
clinical_logic.documentation_rule: Documentation of "Tense compartment" or "Absent pulses" mandatory.
clinical_logic.coding_note: Fasciotomy = life/limb-saving emergency procedure — highest urgency classification.
clinical_logic.ai_trigger: Emergency Gate: auto-flag for immediate authorization.

clinical_logic.coding_note: Fasciotomy = life/limb-saving emergency procedure — highest urgency classification.
clinical_logic.ai_trigger: Emergency Gate: auto-flag for immediate authorization.

clinical_logic.clinical_gate: Superficial: simple removal. Deep (below fascia): requires OR + C-Arm for localization.
clinical_logic.documentation_rule: "Radio-opaque" or "Deep to Fascia" documentation mandatory for deep FB.
clinical_logic.ai_trigger: C-Arm Matcher: Deep FB Removal → ensure C-Arm/Imaging charges included in bill.
clinical_logic.insurance_risk: Mode of Injury check for deep FB — potential exclusions.

clinical_logic.clinical_gate: Superficial: simple removal. Deep (below fascia): requires OR + C-Arm for localization.

clinical_logic.insurance_risk: Mode of Injury check for deep FB — potential exclusions.

exclusion_hunter.description: Auto-reject claim if these keywords found in ER or admission notes

ncv_matcher.description: CTS surgery requires positive NCV/EMG report
ncv_matcher.required_evidence: Positive NCV/EMG Test — Median/Ulnar nerve compression

occupational_alert.description: Trigger Finger in manual labor worker — potential Workers Compensation
occupational_alert.check: Patient occupation — if repetitive hand motion at work → flag workman compensation

hardware_auditor.description: Plates and screws only justified for comminuted/complex fractures
hardware_auditor.rule: K-Wire = standard. Plate+Screws only if fracture documented as Comminuted or Complex
hardware_auditor.action: FLAG_NON_MEDICALLY_NECESSARY if simple fracture with plate+screws

carm_matcher.description: Deep FB removal must include C-Arm imaging charges

timing_checker.description: Tendon repair >24h post-injury requires different coding tier
timing_checker.rule: Time of Injury in ER notes. >24h = Delayed Repair coding tier (higher infection risk)

cosmetic_filter.description: Reject cosmetic procedures or flag abdominoplasty
cosmetic_filter.rule: 90% rejection rate for pure cosmetic. Must have functional diastasis with symptoms

imaging_gates.carpal_tunnel: NCV/EMG mandatory — no surgery without it
imaging_gates.scaphoid: X-ray 3 views + CT/MRI may be needed for scaphoid
